card_name_verified: TD First Class℠ Visa Signature® Credit Card ($89 AF, waived first year)
_review_reason: Pure earnings card (3x travel/dining, 1x other). Mile redemption tiering (25k+ for full value, <25k half value) is mechanism, not credit. No FX fees (qualitative). 25k SUB (one-time). No fixed USD recurring credits.
_excluded: 0% intro APR balance transfer (limited-time, not RC)
